source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 9: Magic (pp.176-179 mechanics) + Chapter 12: Grimoire (pp.246-300 spell descriptions). Casting requires Hard POW roll on first cast; learning requires Hard INT roll; MP regenerates 1/hour (2/hour if POW>100).

spells.name: Apportion Ka
spells.description: Transfer life essence into a vital organ for safekeeping, granting invulnerability.

spells.name: Banishment of Yde Etad
spells.description: Sends trans-dimensional human-like intelligences home.

spells.name: Bless Blade
spells.description: Enchants a blade to deal magical damage.

spells.name: Body Warping of Gorgoroth
spells.description: Reshapes the body of a victim into a grotesque form.

spells.name: Breath of the Deep
spells.description: Causes the victim to grow gills and breathe water.

spells.name: Brew Space Mead
spells.description: Creates space-mead for interstellar travel.

spells.name: Call Deity
spells.description: Calls a Great Old One or Outer God.

spells.name: Dismiss Deity
spells.description: Dismisses a called deity.

spells.name: Cause/Cure Blindness
spells.description: Causes or cures blindness in the target.

spells.name: Chant of Thoth
spells.description: Allows the caster to read any text.

spells.name: Cloud Memory
spells.description: Erases a specific memory from the target.

spells.name: Clutch of Nyogtha
spells.description: Conjures a tentacle to crush the target.

spells.name: Consume Likeness
spells.description: Steals the appearance of another being.

spells.name: Contact Spells
spells.description: Contact a specific Mythos entity via telepathy.

spells.name: Contact Deity Spells
spells.description: Contact a specific deity telepathically.

spells.name: Create Barrier of Naach-Tith
spells.description: Creates an impenetrable barrier.

spells.name: Create Zombie
spells.description: Animates a corpse as a zombie servant.

spells.name: Curse of the Putrid Husk
spells.description: Withers the target's body over time.

spells.name: Death Spell
spells.description: Kills a living target outright.

spells.name: Dominate
spells.description: Takes control of a target's mind. Opposed POW roll.

spells.name: Dread Curse of Azathoth
spells.description: Channels destructive energy from Azathoth.

spells.name: Dust of Suleiman
spells.description: Creates magical dust that reveals invisible entities.

spells.name: Elder Sign
spells.description: Creates a protective ward against Mythos entities.

spells.name: Enchant Book
spells.description: Enchants a book to be indestructible.

spells.name: Enchant Knife
spells.description: Enchants a knife for ritual use.

spells.name: Enchant Pipes
spells.description: Enchants pan pipes to summon or control.

spells.name: Enchant Sacrificial Dagger
spells.description: Enchants a dagger to bypass magical protections.

spells.name: Enchant Whistle
spells.description: Enchants a whistle to summon specific creatures.

spells.name: Enthrall Victim
spells.description: Mesmerizes a target into a trance.

spells.name: Evil Eye
spells.description: Inflicts a curse through eye contact.

spells.name: Fist of Yog-Sothoth
spells.description: Conjures a massive invisible fist to strike.

spells.name: Flesh Ward
spells.description: Creates magical armor absorbing physical damage.

spells.name: Green Decay
spells.description: Causes the target's flesh to rot and decay.

spells.name: Implant Fear
spells.description: Plants a deep terror in the target's mind.

spells.name: Melt Flesh
spells.description: Causes the target's flesh to melt from bone.

spells.name: Mental Suggestion
spells.description: Plants a suggestion in the target's mind.

spells.name: Mindblast
spells.description: Psychic assault causing stun and damage.

spells.name: Mind Exchange
spells.description: Swaps the caster's mind with the target's.

spells.name: Mind Transfer
spells.description: Permanently transfers mind to a new body.

spells.name: Mirror of Tarkhun Atep
spells.description: Reflects spells and magical effects back at caster.

spells.name: Powder of Ibn-Ghazi
spells.description: Creates powder that reveals invisible creatures.

spells.name: Resurrection
spells.description: Returns a recently dead person to life.

spells.name: Shrivelling
spells.description: Withers and weakens the target's body.

spells.name: Song of Hastur
spells.description: Sustained song that drives listeners insane.

spells.name: Summon/Bind Spells
spells.description: Summons and binds a Mythos creature.

spells.name: Separate Binding
spells.description: Separates a bound creature from the caster.

spells.name: Voorish Sign
spells.description: Enhances the caster's magical sensing ability.

spells.name: Warding
spells.description: Creates a protective ward on a stone or object.

spells.name: Wave of Oblivion
spells.description: Erases all memory of a target from the world.

spells.name: Wither Limb
spells.description: Permanently withers one of the target's limbs.

spells.name: Words of Power
spells.description: Channels raw cosmic energy through speech.

spells.name: Wrack
spells.description: Inflicts intense pain on the target.

spells.name: Bargain with Nyogtha
spells.description: Opens a pact with the dweller Nyogtha to exchange service for power.

spells.name: Blast of Power
spells.description: Hurls a bolt of pure magical force at a single target.

spells.name: Bone Gleam
spells.description: Coats bone with a protective sheen that wards against breakage.

spells.name: Cursed Wound
spells.description: Ensures a wound inflicted will not heal by ordinary means.

spells.name: Drain Life
spells.description: Siphons life force from a victim to restore the caster.

spells.name: Eldritch Sign
spells.description: Inscribes a sign that repels Mythos entities.

spells.name: Enslave Mind
spells.description: Binds the target's will to the caster's commands.

spells.name: Eyes of Eibon
spells.description: Grants sight into the spirit world and invisible things.

spells.name: Falcon's Eye
spells.description: Sharpen distant vision to that of a bird of prey.

spells.name: Glamour
spells.description: Alters the caster's appearance and voice to deceive others.

spells.name: Ironhands
spells.description: Grants tremendous crushing strength to the hands and grip.

spells.name: Lend Life
spells.description: Permanently transfers some of the caster's life energy to another.

spells.name: Lycanthropic Control
spells.description: Commands a were-creature or assumes its form.

spells.name: Mantle of Cthulhu
spells.description: Cloaks the caster in the dream-aura of Great Cthulhu.

spells.name: Mesmerize
spells.description: Holds a target spellbound and unable to act.

spells.name: Morpheus
spells.description: Induces or steers the dreams of a sleeping target.

spells.name: Offering of the Blood
spells.description: Sacrifices blood to strengthen another spell or summoning.

spells.name: Pillar of Hellfire
spells.description: Calls down a roaring column of infernal flame.

spells.name: Query the Spirit
spells.description: Forces a summoned spirit to answer one truthful question.

spells.name: Resurrection of Me
spells.description: Restores life to a corpse at terrible personal cost.

spells.name: Seal of Nyarlathotep
spells.description: Marks a place or object with the crawling chaos's sigil.

spells.name: See Invisible
spells.description: Reveals entities and objects hidden from normal sight.

spells.name: Send Dreams
spells.description: Projects a chosen dream or vision to a distant target.

spells.name: Steal Mind
spells.description: Tears knowledge or memories from a victim's mind.

spells.name: Stifle
spells.description: Smothers a target's breath, choking them.

spells.name: Summon Hellfire
spells.description: Calls elemental fire from the pit to consume the target.

spells.name: Swim Like a Fish
spells.description: Grants the caster extraordinary agility and breath in water.

spells.name: Touch of Death
spells.description: A single touch stops the target's heart.

spells.name: True Seeing
spells.description: Pierces illusions and disguises to reveal the truth.

spells.name: Walk the Path
spells.description: Steps the caster between two points via the dreamlands.
